channel.title: Kali on One UFO
channel.description: Recent content in Kali on One UFO

item.title: Kali Linux New Desktop Environment
item.description: New Desktop Environment and GTK3 Theme The solution we’ve committed to is lightweight and can run on all levels of Kali installs. It is functional in that it handles the various needs of the average user with no changes. It is approachable where it uses standard UI concepts we are all familiar with to ensure there is no learning curve. And it looks great with modern UI elements that make efficient use of screen space.
